parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
const now  = new Date().toISOString();
const tierColors = { CRITICAL: '#dc3545', HIGH: '#fd7e14', MEDIUM: '#ffc107', LOW: '#28a745' };
return [{ json: {
  incident_id:       `FS-${Date.now()}`,
  logged_at:         now,
  tier:              body.tier              || 'UNKNOWN',
  risk_score:        body.risk_score        || 0,
  verdict:           body.verdict           || 'UNKNOWN',
  outlook_action:    body.outlook_action    || 'REVIEW',
  prediction_id:     body.prediction_id     || null,
  ai_generated_prob: body.ai_generated_probability || 0,
  roberta_prob:      body.roberta_phishing_prob     || 0,
  top_indicators:    body.top_indicators    || [],
  header_flags:      body.header_flags      || [],
  injection_score:   body.injection_score   || 0,
  email_preview:     body.email_preview     || '',
  source:            body.source            || 'outlook_plugin',
  tier_color:        tierColors[body.tier]  || '#888888',
  requires_approval: body.tier === 'CRITICAL',
  raw:               body
}}];

const d = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { status: 'logged_quietly', incident_id: d.incident_id, tier: d.tier, risk_score: d.risk_score } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'received', incident_id: $('Enrich Payload').first().json.incident_id, tier: $('Enrich Payload').first().json.tier, workflow: 'activated', message: 'FraudShield incident response workflow triggered' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'workflow_complete', action: $json.action_taken, incident_id: $json.incident_id, decision: $json.analyst_decision, message: 'Incident response workflow completed' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'workflow_complete', action: $json.action_taken, incident_id: $json.incident_id, decision: $json.analyst_decision, message: 'False positive marked and queued for retraining' }) }}
